attributes.requirement: Pre-approved evaluation is deterministic and does not inspect terminal state.
attributes.evidence: ApprovalSession._authorize_pre_approved uses only category and immutable approved_tools; TerminalAuthorizer is unused for this mode.

attributes.requirement: Tests remain offline with fake handlers and temporary workspaces.
attributes.evidence: 76 affected unit/integration tests pass without network; live UAT was supplemental only.

attributes.requirement: Only exact CLI-listed consequential tools execute without prompts.
attributes.evidence: Listing write_file does not approve run_python_file; CLI rejects unknown/read/duplicate/empty allowlists.

attributes.requirement: Pre-approval cannot bypass path or symlink validation.
attributes.evidence: Agent regression with listed write/exec symlink escapes returns confinement errors and leaves outside files untouched.

attributes.requirement: Models cannot expand the allowlist through arguments or output.
attributes.evidence: approved_tools is constructed only from CLI flags before OpenAI client creation.
